latin: Adulescens insolitus, qui artes nullas habebat, amico suo Pedro in electione adiuvare constituit. per totam scholam scripsit: 'SUFFRAGIUM PEDRO DATE.'

questions.prompt: What does the unusual teenager decide to do?
questions.target: Help his friend Pedro in an election
choices: Help his friend Pedro in an election

questions.prompt: What message did he write around the school?

translation: An unusual teenager, who had no skills, decided to help his friend Pedro in the election. Throughout the whole school he wrote: 'VOTE FOR PEDRO.'
